ocr_snippet: CONDITION AT DISCHARGE:- STABLE. DIET ADVICE:- SOFT DIET. ADVICE MEDICINE:- S.NO MEDICINE NAME DOSE ROUTE FREQUENCY DAYS 1. TAB EMESET 500MG ORAL TWICE A DAY 5 DAYS 2. CAP VIZYLAC ORAL SOS 5 DAYS 3. TAB METFORMIN 500MG ORAL ONCE A DAY 5 DAYS 4. SYP LOZOR 10ML AT BED TIME 5 DAYS 5. TAB SHEL-HD 1 ORAL ONCE A DAY 5 DAYS 6. CAP ULTRACET 1 ORAL SOS 5 DAYS 7. TAB VITAMIN-C 1 ORAL ONCE A DAY 5 DAYS 8. SYR ARISTOZYME 2 TSP ORAL TWICE A DAY 5 DAYS Advice :- Hold Cosprin/or any blood thinner for 30 days.
